name: Coastal Companion
description: Real-time multilingual meeting translation plus AI meeting notes. Live audio/text is detected and translated into a chosen main language, spoken back in real time, and the transcript is synthesized into formatted notes. 'Coastal Companion' is the branded label of the Spinner extension inside Coastal Brewing.
backend: Spinner service (../../service) — exposes /api/v1/companion/*. Deployed inline on coastal-runner today; migrating to the standalone `spinner-service` container (parallel, then cut over). The host field below reflects the current reality, not the end state.

ingest.notes: Audio/text in. Detects the source language and translates to the chosen main language (the target frame). Freemium-gated.

lens.notes: explain | research | summarize | ideate over a turn or transcript. Paid text routes via the Inworld Router.

decode.notes: Decode industry/jargon for the active fork.

synthesize.notes: Transcript + format in. Produces meeting notes in the requested export format.

voices.notes: Inworld voice catalog (custom dashboard voices first). Free to browse.

speak.notes: Speak a line via Inworld TTS (MP3). PAID (Spinner+).

realtime.notes: Full-duplex live speech-to-speech interpreter. PCM16 24kHz both ways; server semantic VAD. Speaks in the FOAI-Charlotte voice. PAID (Spinner+); idle + max-duration cost guard.

plan.notes: Tier + usage meter + pricing — drives the freemium meter + upgrade paywall.

triggers.intent: incoming audio/text in any language during a meeting
continuous two-way spoken conversation (the user wants live, spoken interpretation)
the user asks for notes, or a meeting segment closes
a scheduling phrase is detected (e.g. "let's meet Thursday")

actions.description: Detect the source language and translate ingested audio/text into the chosen main language via POST /api/v1/companion/ingest.
Full-duplex live speech-to-speech translation over WS /api/v1/companion/realtime/stream (Inworld realtime), spoken back in the FOAI-Charlotte voice. PAID.
Speak a translated/explained line aloud via Inworld TTS, POST /api/v1/companion/speak. PAID.
Turn the transcript into formatted meeting notes via POST /api/v1/companion/synthesize (google/gemini-2.5-flash).
On a detected scheduling intent, create a Cal.com booking.

guardrails: Translation and notes are assistive; the original-language transcript is retained for verification.
Free-tier translation runs on non-private models and is metered (300k tokens/mo) — disclosed in-product; paid tier is secure.
No medical, legal, or financial advice is generated by this app.

pricing.free_tier: Translation is free (metered, non-private). Voice + realtime duplex are Spinner+ (paid).
